treatment_information.dosage_or_details: 100 mg/kg per day in 3–4 divided doses
temporary cessation of protein intake, increase in calorie intake, IV carnitine, aggressive anti febrile and anti infectious treatment

treatment_timeline.event: Diagnosis of GA I through newborn screening
Initiation of mild protein restriction and carnitine supplementation
Neuropsychological assessment for patients older than 3 years of age

patient_outcome.final_status: varied among patients, from normal development to severe motor difficulties
patient_outcome.complications: No complications mentioned for most patients; one patient had intermittent dystonic posturing
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: varied among patients, from normal to wheelchair-bound
